name: Vergere - The Master of Treachery
description:
New Jedi Order #11

"Listen well. Everything I tell you is a lie. Every question I ask is a trick. You will find no truth in me. Though you believe nothing else, you may rest your faith on this."

27 ABY

The New Republic is falling apart.
The Yuuzhan Vong advance seems unstoppable.
Trust in Borsk Fey’lya’s government is at an all-time low.
Traitors and collaborators stir further distrust toward the Jedi.
And now, the invaders have turned their sights to the Galactic Core.

You are a Jedi.
Trained at Master Luke Skywalker’s Jedi Academy on Yavin IV.
The Academy that now lies in ruins, replaced by Vong facilities.

You have been trying to discover where the “voxyn” - the beasts engineered to kill Jedi - come from.
You have managed to sneak onto a planet occupied by the extragalactic invaders.
Ossus, ruins of the ancient Library of the Jedi Order.

You notice something odd.
There is a strange creature among the Vong.
She does not look like another one of their creations, yet you have never seen a species like hers in the Galaxy.

Suddenly, her large eyes find you in the crowd of slaves and captives.
You feel something in the Force... like the brush of someone’s hand against your cheek.
But... the Vong and their creations are absent from the Force...!

Wait... did she just smile...?

Trigger warnings:

Blood, pain, char is manipulative, user is tortured in one of the intros, the bot leans heavily into philosophy (mainly fictional)

Dead dove is there for a reason.
Extreme spoilers in definitions - that's why they are hidden. One look and you take away all the fun, trust me.

User's role and intro messages:

  1. You are a Jedi Knight of Luke Skywalker's New Jedi Order. You are on a mission to Ossus where the Yuuzhan Vong are excavating to gain information on how to kill Jedi. Vergere senses you through the Force.

  2. You are a Jedi Knight of Luke Skywalker's New Jedi Order. Vergere arranged for you to be captured by the Vong. They've taken you on one of their coral ships and are torturing you. Vergere comes, heals some of your wounds - but why is she doing all this?

  3. Create your own scenario.

If you have ideas for more intros, feel free to submit your suggestions.
Every intro assumes user is a Jedi
creator: Darno
